items.subjective_preview: Patient returns for anxiety follow-up. Reports significant improvement since starting sertraline 50mg 3 months ago. Worry episodes have decreased from...
items.objective_preview: General: Pleasant, cooperative, well-groomed. Mental status: Alert and oriented x3. Mood described as 'much better.' Affect appropriate and congruent....
items.assessment: Generalized anxiety disorder - responding well to SSRI therapy and CBT
items.plan:
1. Continue sertraline 50mg daily - effective at current dose
2. Continue CBT sessions biweekly
3. Encourage continued use of relaxation techniques and mindfulness
4. No dose adjustment needed at this time
5. Follow-up in 3 months
6. Return sooner if symptoms worsen or new concerns arise
